title: Centuries
why_this_song: Centuries by Fall Out Boy (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "But you will remember me"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Remember me, for centuries"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "We'll go down in history"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "We'll go down in history"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Some legends are told"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remember" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remember" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "centuries" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "centuries" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Some turn to dust or to gold

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Centuries" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Centuries" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Centuries" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Centuries", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Centuries" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Centuries" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
